the_exit_theory.Short Description:
Winner of BYOG 2023.
A platform puzzle game where players explore creative theories to uncover the reason behind a man’s sudden decision to leave his home.
the_exit_theory.Description: The award-winning platform puzzle game that won BYOG 2023. In the game, players explore the story of a man who, for the first time, leaves his home—an event that sparks four friends to theorize and test various explanations. Each theory is brought to life through puzzles, as players work to uncover the true reason behind the seemingly mundane event. The game blends imaginative storytelling with fun, challenging mechanics, offering an engaging and enjoyable experience.
the_exit_theory.Responsibilities:
Led the design and implementation of levels and puzzles, ensuring engaging progression and challenging gameplay.
Integrated core game mechanics for player interaction, creating smooth and intuitive player-environment interactions.
Assisted with audio integration, adding sound effects and music to enhance the game's atmosphere.
Contributed to cutscene creation and animation integration, ensuring smooth transitions to support the overall narrative.
Worked closely with the team to align gameplay and technical elements for a cohesive experience.

agents_of_influence.Short Description: Navigate a world of misinformation and develop critical thinking skills in this spy-themed educational game where player choices shape the outcome, while teaching how to assess media and sources.
agents_of_influence.Description: Agents of Influence is an educational game designed to teach players how to critically assess information in a world filled with misinformation. As a spy agent, players navigate through scenarios where they must make decisions based on various pieces of information, learning to identify logical fallacies, evaluate sources, and understand the consequences of their choices. The game uses a dynamic system where player choices affect not only the outcome of the story but also future dialogues, encouraging deeper engagement and replayability. With interactive gameplay and an immersive narrative, players are empowered to become more discerning consumers of information, gaining valuable skills for navigating the complexities of the modern media landscape.
agents_of_influence.Responsibilities:
Developed a flexible dialogue system that supported branching choices and the integration of mini-games, ensuring a dynamic and engaging player experience.
Implemented additional layers to the dialogue system, allowing different options to appear during revisits and influencing future dialogues.
Made the dialogue system designer-friendly, enabling easy updates and adjustments to content.
Managed database integration with Firebase, utilizing JavaScript to bridge the gap between Firebase and Unity WebGL, ensuring smooth player data management.
Integrated cutscenes, SFX, and music to enhance the immersive storytelling experience.

kings_defence.Short Description: Protect your kingdom in this epic tower defense game by strategically placing heroes with magical powers to fend off waves of enemies, unlock new abilities, and face increasingly tough challenges.
kings_defence.Description: In Kings Defence, players are tasked with protecting their kingdom from waves of enemies by strategically placing heroes imbued with magical powers. Players can place heroes with magical abilities, such as spells that freeze or burn enemies, providing strategic ways to thwart incoming waves of invaders. As players progress through the levels, they unlock new heroes, spells, and face increasingly diverse and challenging enemies. With engaging gameplay, players must use strategy to defend their castle from the forces of evil
kings_defence.Responsibilities:
Designed and implemented a dynamic system to accommodate future expansion, ensuring seamless integration of new units (both enemies and allies) into the game.
Integrated animations and VFX, enhancing the visual appeal and creating a more immersive experience for players.
Added external packages for ads (Unity Ads) and database management (Firebase), ensuring smooth functionality for in-game ads and player data storage.
Collaborated with the team to maintain flexibility in the game’s architecture, allowing for easy updates and future additions.

kings_kombat.Short Description: Deploy heroes with unique abilities and lead your army to victory in this online multiplayer strategy game, where every match is a battle for control of the enemy's castle.
kings_kombat.Description: Kings Kombat is an exciting online multiplayer strategy game where players face off in real-time battles to destroy their opponent's castle. Players choose from a variety of heroes, each with distinct special abilities that can be activated by tapping. These heroes spawn units that automatically move forward on the battlefield, engaging enemies as they progress. The goal is to strategically deploy heroes and manage your units effectively to destroy the enemy's castle while defending your own. With intense, fast-paced gameplay and tactical decision-making, Kings Kombat offers a dynamic and competitive experience where every match is different.
kings_kombat.Responsibilities:
Developed a flexible system to accommodate new units (both allies and enemies) in future updates, ensuring seamless integration of new content.
Integrated animations and VFX to enhance the visual appeal and overall player experience.
Added external packages for ads (Unity Ads) and database management (Firebase), ensuring smooth functionality for in-game advertising and player data storage.
Implemented multiplayer functionality using Photon Unity Networking (PUN2), allowing for real-time online battles between players.
Managed synchronization between players' game states and actions, ensuring a smooth and responsive multiplayer experience.
Integrated cutscenes, SFX, and music to enhance the immersive gameplay experience.

plumber_connect_pipes.Short Description: A challenging pipeline puzzle game where players restore water flow by strategically connecting pipes. As Pureville’s best plumber, fix the sabotaged water system and save the town’s economy!
plumber_connect_pipes.Description: Plumber Connect Pipes is a brain-teasing puzzle game where players take on the role of a skilled plumber working to restore Pureville’s disrupted water supply. The town thrives on its pristine water, but a jealous neighboring town has sabotaged the pipeline system. Using logic and strategy, players must connect pipes in the correct order to get the water flowing again. With beautifully crafted antique-style visuals, diverse skin packs, and a variety of difficulty levels, this game offers both fun and mental exercise for players of all ages.
plumber_connect_pipes.Responsibilities:
Implemented pipeline puzzle mechanics based on design specifications.
Created a custom tool in Unity to help designers easily position pipes for level creation.
Developed an intuitive and user-friendly control system.
Assisted in designing the antique-style UI and visual elements.
Optimized gameplay experience for smooth and engaging interaction.
Integrated in-app purchases and ads for monetization.
Developed a system for player customization, allowing users to personalize their gameplay experience with different skin packs.

snake_escape.Short Description: A board game inspired by Snakes and Ladders, but with a twist—battle snakes in turn-based card duels as you roll the dice and strategize your way to escape.
snake_escape.Description: Snake Escape is a unique blend of a board game and a card-based battle system. Playing as a wizard trapped in a snake-guarded prison, you must roll the dice and navigate a board filled with different tile effects—damage, healing, mystery, and snake encounters. When facing a snake, you engage in turn-based card battles, using action and reaction cards to counter attacks and deal damage. If you win, you continue forward; if you lose, you're sent back to the snake’s tail. With strategic decision-making and time-sensitive reactions, every turn brings you closer to freedom—or deeper into captivity.
snake_escape.Responsibilities:
Contributed to the game's core concept, including card mechanics and battle system design.
Designed a variety of action and reaction cards for engaging strategic battles.
Implemented the battle system and card mechanics, ensuring smooth and balanced gameplay.
Designed and developed a pseudo-dialogue system that provides contextual and repeatable dialogue based on the snake’s health and previous encounters.

orbit.Short Description: An endless hypercasual game where players control a planet orbiting a black hole, tapping to resist its pull while dodging incoming meteors.
orbit.Description: Orbit is a fast-paced hypercasual game that puts players in control of a planet caught in the gravitational pull of a black hole. The planet is constantly being dragged toward the singularity, and players must tap at the right moments to resist its pull while navigating an increasingly chaotic field of meteors being sucked into the abyss. With simple yet engaging mechanics, Orbit offers a fun and challenging experience that keeps players coming back for more.
orbit.Responsibilities:
Developed core gameplay mechanics, ensuring smooth and engaging player interactions.
Created particle effects to enhance visual feedback during gameplay.
Integrated sound and music to complement the gameplay experience.
Designed and implemented a reusable package for UI, ads, and Google Play integration to streamline development.

kings_royale.Short Description: A 3D online multiplayer strategy game where players deploy heroes with unique abilities, merge units to unlock special attacks, and battle for control of the enemy’s castle.
kings_royale.Description: Kings Royale is an online multiplayer strategy game where players deploy heroes with unique abilities to lead their armies into battle. Each hero spawns units that automatically advance toward the enemy’s castle, engaging in real-time combat. A unique merge mechanic allows players to combine units, triggering powerful special abilities that can shift the momentum of battle. With strategic unit placement, fast-paced action, and competitive online matches, Kings Royale offers an exciting and dynamic strategy experience.
kings_royale.Responsibilities:
Developed a flexible system to accommodate new units and heroes, allowing for future updates.
Implemented the merge mechanic, enabling players to combine units and trigger special abilities.
Integrated animations and VFX to enhance the visual appeal of the fully 3D battlefield.
Added external packages for ads (Unity Ads) and database management (Firebase).
Implemented multiplayer functionality using Photon Fusion for real-time battles.
Managed synchronization between players' game states and actions to ensure smooth online gameplay.
Integrated cutscenes, SFX, and music to enhance immersion.
